task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

input.content:
Q3 Kickoff Meeting Agenda
Duration: 90 Minutes

Objective: Align the team on Q3 goals, review key learnings from Q2, and outline major initiatives for the upcoming quarter.

0:00 - 0:10 (10 min) | Welcome & Q2 Review
- Welcome and opening remarks
- Highlight Q2 successes and key wins
- Discuss major learnings and areas for improvement

0:10 - 0:30 (20 min) | Q3 Objectives and Key Results (OKRs)
- Present high-level business goals for Q3
- Walkthrough of department-specific OKRs
- How our work connects to the broader company vision

0:30 - 0:55 (25 min) | Deep Dive: Key Initiatives
- Detailed overview of major projects starting in Q3
- Resource allocation and priority mapping
- Potential roadblocks and risk mitigation strategies

0:55 - 1:15 (20 min) | Team Alignment & Cross-functional Collaboration
- Breakout discussions or group alignment on team responsibilities
- Identifying dependencies with other teams
- Establishing communication cadences for new projects

1:15 - 1:25 (10 min) | Open Q&A
- Team questions, clarifications, and feedback

1:25 - 1:30 (5 min) | Wrap-up & Next Steps
- Action items and owners
- Final motivational remarks and closing

content.text:
I have created the agenda for the 90-minute Q3 kickoff meeting and saved it to the file `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt`. 

The agenda includes time allocations for a Q2 review, Q3 objectives (OKRs), deep dives into key initiatives, team alignment/collaboration, a Q&A session, and wrap-up steps. Let me know if you need any adjustments to the schedule!
